description_long: This object is a large, rectangular block made of speckled gray granite, featuring a uniform, flat top and straight, sharply defined edges. The surface texture is slightly rough, with a matte finish that diffuses light rather than reflecting it. The coloration is predominantly a mix of light and medium grays, interspersed with small flecks of darker minerals, typical of quarried granite. All visible faces are flat and unadorned, with no visible chips, cracks, or signs of significant wear. The block appears solid and heavy, suggesting it is intended for use as a barrier or structural element in an urban environment. There are no visible engravings, markings, or decorative features, emphasizing its utilitarian function.
description: A solid, rectangular granite block with a speckled gray surface and flat, sharply defined edges. The stone is unadorned and has a slightly rough, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, broad face of the granite block with its speckled gray texture and sharp lower edge.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the block's depth and maintains the same speckled granite texture and straight edges.
description_view_2: Rear view is visually identical to the front, displaying the same flat, unmarked granite surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the first side, with consistent texture and blocky proportions.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set on a leveled concrete or compacted gravel base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no chips or discoloration.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
